name: Ali (Mohammad Ali)
title: Comedy Legend - The Evergreen Entertainer

comedyEssence.commercialAppeal: Consistent box office draw across 1000+ films; comedy presence adds guaranteed entertainment value to any film

bio: Mohammad Ali, born October 10, 1968 in Rajahmundry, is a legendary Telugu comedian with 1000+ films across four decades. Starting as child artist in Seethakoka Chiluka (1981), he evolved into Telugu cinema's most prolific comedian. Director S.V. Krishna Reddy's comic roles in the 1990s, including Yamaleela, established his signature style. His memorable performances in blockbusters like Pokiri (₹70+ crore), Kick, Attarintiki Daaredi (₹150+ crore), and Gabbar Singh showcased his commercial power. Still actively performing in 2024-2025 films like Saripodhaa Sanivaaram and Double iSmart, Ali remains relevant across generations with iconic dialogues and viral comedy moments.

trivia: Ali has acted in over 1000 films across Telugu, Tamil, Kannada, and Hindi languages - one of the highest filmographies in Indian cinema history
Started career as child artist in 1981 with Nandi Award-winning performance; seamlessly transitioned to comedy roles
Director S.V. Krishna Reddy specifically created new comic roles for Ali, launching his comedy career in early 1990s
Successfully balanced parallel career as lead hero (Yamaleela, Ghatothkachudu, Pittala Dora) while continuing as comedian
Hosted popular TV shows including Ali Talkies (MAA TV), ATM (Gemini TV), and Ali Tho Jaaliga (ETV)
Born Mohammad Ali in Rajahmundry to Mohammed Basha and Zaitun Bibi; brother Khayyum also works in Telugu cinema
Created iconic 'tongue-out laugh' expression that became his signature physical comedy trademark
Worked with every major Telugu hero across four generations - from Chiranjeevi to Pawan Kalyan to Mahesh Babu to current generation
His comedy scenes from Pokiri contributed to the film becoming highest-grossing Telugu film of its time (₹70+ crore)
Still actively signing films in 2024-2025, maintaining 40+ year career with no retirement plans
Known for spontaneous improvisations during comedy scenes that directors often retain in final cuts
Received two Filmfare Awards and two Nandi Awards recognizing comedy excellence across different decades
knownFor: 1000+ films across 44-year career - legendary Telugu comedy icon
